201948063.note: Retro = % of combined waybills from Bottlers + Gurea entities. Gurea (405152953) has its own separate retro at 2.76% — both formulas use same waybills, different sides. Discovered 2026-05-19.

205274834.name: ბარამბო შპს

205274834.note: საკონდიტრო brand. Sales variance high; rate jumps Mar-Apr. Possibly mixed: marketing + retro components.
